## Description

Brief description of the changes in this pull request.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Data update (updated statistics or data sources)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes without errors
- [ ] `npm test` passes without errors
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (375px width)
- [ ] Tested on desktop viewport
- [ ] Data sources are cited for any new statistics or figures
- [ ] No hardcoded income values without source attribution
- [ ] Code follows existing project style and conventions
- [ ] Self-reviewed the code for clarity and correctness
